visual_description: The scene opens on a black screen with white Chinese characters in the top left corner. It then cuts to a wide, high-angle shot of a modern, multi-level office interior. Several people in business attire are visible, some walking on a lower floor and others sitting at desks. A prominent staircase with a metal railing is in the foreground, leading up to a higher level.
audio_description: A male voice speaks in Mandarin Chinese. The audio is clear and the tone is neutral and informative, as if reading a report.
